top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.birthday) BETWEEN '1987' AND '1992';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.birthday) BETWEEN '1987' AND '1992';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player p
INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE CAST(strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.birthday >= '1987-01-01' AND p.birthday <= '1992-12-31';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.birthday) BETWEEN '1987' AND '1992';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player p
INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE CAST(strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.birthday >= '1987-01-01' AND p.birthday <= '1992-12-31';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.birthday) BETWEEN '1987' AND '1992';
